title: Poppa Langley and Stepmutterhow much did Asuka know
display_title: Poppa Langley and Stepmutterhow much did Asuka know
wikitext:
[]: Poppa Langley and Stepmutter...how much did Asuka know?             Quote Post by V » Wed Feb 27, 2008 9:42 pm This came up in another thread but: It's not immediately obvious to the casual viewer, but the evidence is really clear from scripting and stuff that Asuka's father was having sex with one of the doctors at Kyoko's mental hospital while Kyoko was still alive but insane. (btw....she was "Kyoko's doctor" right? Or "one of her doctors"? Or just "a doctor there"?) Anyway, seeing as what we "see and hear" in these flashbacks is based on Asuka's memories (as a narrative device) I wonder: while "we the audience" were supposed to understand "Poppa Langley has already moved on to someone else and has a sexual relationship with her and has basically abandoned Kyoko as irreversibly insane" ...did *4 year old child-Asuka* know that her father was "in a relationship"/having sex with future-Stepmutter? This is important to our understanding of Asuka's emotional scarring/later psychology.

[]:             Quote Post by Sachi » Wed Feb 27, 2008 9:50 pm Perhaps... And if so, that can also be a reason why she accuses Misato of being disgusting when she hooks back up with Kaji and thinks that sexual relationships are disgusting. And she avoided relationships, (like in ep 8 when all those love letters fell out of her locker and she stomped on them) maybe because she didn't want to be like her dad. Plus with all her pride, she wouldn't want to be known as a hypocrite, so she hid her feelings for Shinji, even though she flirted with him. So yeah, all this could be related to her childhood. I think this may even be discussion worthy!

[]:             Quote Post by honsou » Thu Feb 28, 2008 8:50 am She probably did know a great deal about her father moving on to another women. But i don't think that in it of it self really affected her. It seemed that what really affected her was what Asuka's stepmother said about her, that she didn't want her and that at any time she could "quit being her mother". Combine this with the fact that her biological mother is calling a doll her daughter and is saying shes just some random little girl, and you have what caused Asuka to be Asuka. She learned that people are not to be trusted, that at anytime, at any moment they could betray you, therefore she thinks that she can only trust her self and no one else. So I think she knew, i just don't think it affected her nearly as much as other factors, if at all.
